name: cms-generation-workflow
description: Machine-readable CMS generation workflow definition — 8 sequential phases from data ingestion to quality validation.

siteUrl.description: Target site URL for CMS generation

steps.name: Generate CMS Pages
steps.description: Read site_urls and extracted_products tables, map page types, generate CMS pages with SEO metadata

steps.name: Generate Brands
steps.description: Extract unique brands from extracted_products, count products per brand, generate brand entries

steps.name: Generate Collections
steps.description: Group products by category, create collections with product references

steps.name: Generate Blog Posts
steps.description: Convert posts table entries to CMS blog-post pages

steps.name: Generate SEO Metadata
steps.description: Generate SEO entries for all CMS pages with meta tags, OG tags, canonical URLs

steps.name: Generate Search Index
steps.description: Build full-text search index across pages, products, brands, collections, blog posts

steps.name: Generate Output Files
steps.description: Generate manifest, search index JSON, navigation JSON, sitemap XML and JSON

steps.name: Validate CMS Quality
steps.description: Run quality validation checks — metadata, SEO, links, duplicates, descriptions
